_meta.description: Curated persona-to-inspiration seed list for the Social Amplifier plugin. Used as Signal 1 of the 5-signal matching algorithm in the match-inspirations skill. Edit manually as the landscape shifts.

anthropic_team.description: Anthropic team members are always included as inspiration for relevant personas. Anthropic is the foundation model Base44 is built on, and their public voices carry weight for builders working in the AI space.

people.name: Mike Krieger
people.why: Instagram co-founder, now Anthropic CPO. Product-led thinking with a builder mindset.

people.name: Jack Clark
people.why: Writes Import AI newsletter — long-running, measured policy and industry analysis. Gold standard for AI comms voice.

people.name: Alex Albert
people.why: Very active, builder-facing Anthropic voice. Ships demos, shares examples, reliable for dev signal.

people.name: Karina Nguyen
people.why: Active technical Twitter, product + research intersection, builder-friendly explanations.

people.name: Amanda Askell
people.why: Thoughtful alignment and ethics voice, measured, academic-adjacent but accessible.

people.name: Dario Amodei
people.why: Anthropic founder voice. Occasional posting but every post carries weight.

people.name: Sam Bowman
people.why: Research Twitter, safety + alignment, technical depth accessible to builders.

anthropic_team.rule: When matching inspirations for a champion, always include the Anthropic team members whose personas list contains the champion's persona. These are added as TIER-1 inspirations alongside the curated persona seeds — not replacing them.

banned.reason: Direct competitor CEOs and marketing leads. Never use as inspiration sources for Base44 champions — their voice leaking into champion content creates brand conflicts.
banned.company_ban_scope: CEOs, marketing leads, and head-of-comms at listed companies are banned. Individual engineers or designers at these companies writing about general industry topics are acceptable case-by-case but must be reviewed by operator before adding.
